titleStmt.title: SII 30.268: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 268. (A.R. No. 620 of 1915.) Aṉṉiyūr, Villupuram Taluk, South Arcot District. Rāmanāthēśvara Temple—On the north base of the central shrine Vīrapratāpa Achutadēva mahārāya: Śaka 14[53], Khara, Kumbha, ba.di. 14, Sravaṇa, Sunday: 1532 A.D. Sunday, Feb. 4

summary.p: Built in at the bottom. It seems to register the gift of the village Tirukkuṉ[ṟakkuḍi] by the Segatāpi Nāgarāsar for the merit of Sāṇi Siṅgappa Nāyakkar, to the temple of Tiruvirāmīśvaramuḍaiya nāyanār at Aṉṉiyūr in the Karuvākshi Sīrmai. The name of a certain Kuṉṟattūrappaṉ, uncle (māmaṉār) of Namasivāya mudaliyār and son of Vasavaiyā mudaliyār of Dāmal is mentioned in this record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī Irācātirāca rācaparameśvara śrīvīrappiṟatāpa śrī Accutateva makārāyar pṛthiviṟācciyam paṇṇiaruḷā niṉṟa cakāptama 10 4[5 10 3] cellā niṉṟa karavaruṣam kumpanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu
catuṟteciyum tiruvoṇamum peṟṟa nāyaṟṟukkiḻamai nāḷ civaṟātri puṇyakālattile cāṇi ciṅkappanāyakkar taṉmamāka karuvāṭci cīrmaiyil Aṉṉiyūr nāḷ cekatāpi nākaṟācā viṭṭa tirukkuṉṟaku
ṭi kiṟāmamu ciṅkappanāyakkar Uttarāpaṭikku tāmal vacavaiyā mutaliyār puttiraṉ namacivāya mutaliyār māmaṉār kuṉṟattūrappaṉ rar nayiṉār puttiran mutaliyār yinta grāmam nāṟpāṟkellaiyum ciṅkappa nāyakkaṟku
Digital edition of SII 30.268 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
